{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Copper Heaven’s Glory disciple
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|A [[Copper Heaven’s Glory disciple]] informed [[Elder Rahm]] that an envoy departed.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13">''Bloodline'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
